overall.description: First-person perspective from a survival video game showing a player walking through tall grass at night toward a distant village. The player draws a wooden club around the 9-second mark and continues approaching the settlement under a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland field with narrow dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass along a dirt path toward distant buildings

narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
large bush with green leaves on the left side of the path
silhouette of buildings against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dark open field at night, surrounded by tall grass. A dirt path leads forward toward a distant village silhouette on the horizon, with a large bush visible to the left.

events.description: player character raises a wooden club into the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk toward the village while holding a wooden club ready in the left hand

entered.detail: hand holding a wooden bat or club visible in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through the tall grass with a wooden club now visible in the left hand. The bush falls behind as the player advances, and the distant village buildings appear slightly closer in the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark open field that gradually closes the distance toward a distant village silhouette. It begins with the camera advancing along a dirt path surrounded by tall grass, passing a large bush on the left under a night sky. As the player continues forward, the bush recedes into the background while a wooden club is drawn into the left hand. The scene then shifts as the player pushes further through the grass, causing the distant buildings of the settlement to loom larger and more distinct against the horizon.
